name: Spanish Draughts
author: traditional / AGP port
description: Spanish draughts (damas españolas): the traditional 8x8 game. Men move and capture forward only, but a man CAN capture a king (unlike Italian). Kings are flying (long-range) and capture in all directions. Capture is mandatory and maximum, chosen by quantity (most pieces) then quality (most kings). Leave the opponent with no legal move to win.
